nodes.speaker: Hong Qigong
nodes.text: Haha, young friend! I am Hong Qigong, the Northern Beggar and leader of the Beggar's Gang. You look quite intelligent. How about I teach you a move?

nodes.speaker: Hong Qigong
nodes.text: Good! This move is called 'Mighty Dragon Repents' - one of the eighteen palms of subduing dragons. When used in Go, it can create overwhelming momentum to intimidate your opponent!

nodes.speaker: Hong Qigong
nodes.text: Remember, the key to this move lies in its momentum. When playing Go, one must dare to advance, be willing to sacrifice, and create irresistible pressure!

options.text: Thank you for your teaching, Senior!
How do I use this skill?

nodes.speaker: Hong Qigong
nodes.text: In Go matches, when your attack momentum is strong, this skill will activate automatically. It increases your stone influence by 20%, making your attacks more powerful!

nodes.speaker: Hong Qigong
nodes.text: Haha, good! Practice well. When you reach level 5, come find me again, and I'll teach you more advanced techniques!

nodes.speaker: Hong Qigong
nodes.text: The 'Five Greats' of the martial world - Eastern Heretic, Western Venom, Southern Emperor, Northern Beggar, and Central Divine. I am the Northern Beggar, leader of the world's largest gang, the Beggar's Gang!

options.text: So impressive! Please teach me a move!

nodes.speaker: Hong Qigong
nodes.text: Alright, young friend. When you've made up your mind, come back anytime. This old beggar will be waiting here!

nodes.speaker: Hong Qigong
nodes.text: You've already learned 'Mighty Dragon Repents'! Practice well, young one. When you reach level 5, come find me for advanced techniques!

nodes.speaker: Hong Qigong
nodes.text: Young friend, your foundation is still insufficient. Go gain more experience first, then come back!

nodes.speaker: Hong Qigong
nodes.text: Good! You've reached level 5. Let me teach you the essence of the Eighteen Palms - 'Seeing the Dragon in the Field'!
